metadata.siteDescription: Private charter flights, helicopter tours, and exclusive routes in Panama

hero.title: Charter flights, helicopter rides, and exclusive routes that turn interest into bookings.
hero.description: Sky Ride Panama combines speed, trust, and premium service to take our clients to any destination.

services.charterDescription: Executive transfers and private routes for business, tourism, and small groups. Fly directly to your destination with no layovers.
services.helicopterDescription: Memorable aerial experiences over Panama City and exclusive destinations. Safety, comfort, and unforgettable views.
services.seatsDescription: More accessible options for flexible travelers seeking speed without sacrificing comfort on shared flights.

fleet.sectionSubtitle: Certified aircraft for every type of flight

routes.sectionSubtitle: High-demand routes ready for immediate booking

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Real testimonials from travelers who chose Sky Ride

footer.blurb: Sky Ride Panama combines private charter, helicopters, and premium routes for travelers who need speed and trust.
